entries.title: ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
Git stash conflicts during scope pivots can silently lose completed work
ADR-017-001: Extraction Facade over Individual Functions
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
